writer.name: 娜吉扎·玛玛特库洛娃 Nargiza Mamatkulova

director.name: 娜吉扎·玛玛特库洛娃 Nargiza Mamatkulova

introduction: A six-year-old girl faces a choice: to continue believing in miracles and fairy tales or to take matters into her own hands and create a wonderful story herself. How far is she willing to go for this?She tenderly loves her doll and enjoys her mother's bedtime stories. During the day, she tries to help her mother by selling bread. Her mother bakes and sells bread from a traditional oven, and then works as a cleaner in a kindergarten. The girl aspires to be a helper and support for her hardworking mother.As New Year approaches, she eagerly awaits a meeting with Santa Claus, hoping to ask for a special gift for her mother. But when she finally meets Santa Claus, her world turns upside down.
